name: l-hub
description: MCP AI Bridge — 智能多模型路由 | Smart Multi-Model Routing for Antigravity
author: Ready Steady Science

l-hub._importantTip.default: 👉 请使用 Cmd+Shift+P 运行 'L-Hub: Open Dashboard' 👈
l-hub._importantTip.description: 💡 核心设置不在本页！L-Hub 采用高度定制的可视化配置面板。请在命令面板打开 Dashboard，以配置架构说明中的各个模型分支和 API Keys。

l-hub.routing.routine.description: Default model for routine tasks (Translation, Documentation, etc.). Use 'auto' for L-Hub dynamic routing.

l-hub.routing.code.description: Default model for coding tasks (Code Generation, Code Review, etc.). Use 'auto' for L-Hub dynamic routing.

l-hub.routing.reasoning.description: Default model for complex reasoning and algorithms. Use 'auto' for L-Hub dynamic routing.

l-hub.routing.creative.description: Preferred setup for Creative Writing Chain. Use 'auto' for L-Hub dynamic multi-model routing.

l-hub.retentionDays.description: 自动清理历史记录的天数 (History Retention Days)。

lhub.routing.routine.description: Default provider for routine tasks (e.g. translation, docs, summaries).

lhub.routing.code.description: Default provider for code engineering tasks (Codex CLI preferred).

lhub.routing.reasoning.description: Default provider for complex reasoning and frontend tasks.

lhub.routing.creative.description: Default model(s) for creative writing tasks.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile
scripts.build:vsix: mkdir -p releases && npx vsce package --out releases/
